header.note: What the auditor caught on the oracle BEFORE this work. Derived, not re-run against a checked-out old tree, and the derivation is exact: (1) every structural detector except test-relaxation is byte-identical code to pre-upgrade, so its recall equals the post number measured with the same fair methodology; (2) test-relaxation was v1.1.0 and missed the toBeGreaterThan(0) relaxation class, measured at 0.04 (reproduce by reverting the test-relaxation matcher broadening); (3) the judge-primary path did not exist, so semantic recall is 0 by construction. The post snapshot is benchmarks/results/post-upgrade/oracle-results.json.
